diff_scope_contract: In --changed-files mode this inspector emits findings for the listed files only and tags each finding with introduced_in_diff: bool per AC-12.1 Mechanism (ii). Findings without an explicit introduced_in_diff: true marker are advisory and non-blocking per the default-safe rule.

duplicate_tests.reason: Two test functions (test_ac7_regression_eisdir_increment_branch_exits_0 and test_ac7b_regression_eisdir_saturated_branch_exits_0) overlap in scenario coverage with tests/generated/20260524-171714/test_arch6_arch3.py (test_ac7_eisdir_increment_branch_exits_0 and test_ac7b_eisdir_saturated_branch_exits_0). These are intentional regression guards for the arch-3 phase-2 redirect-order micro-fix, not accidental duplicates — the new file name suffix '_regression' signals deliberate overlap. No file-level duplicate test suite; two cases intentionally overlap prior regression coverage.
duplicate_tests.recommendation: Advisory only — intentional regression guard overlap. No action required unless a strict deduplication policy is enforced; in that case remove the two _regression_ functions and rely on the existing coverage in test_arch6_arch3.py.

orphaned_tests.reason: Test folder is missing both a per-task manifest (tests/generated/20260524-205459/manifest.json) and a global manifest entry in tests/generated/manifest.json. Per the test-writer agent contract (agents/test-writer.md lines 80-122), each generated test task must have a per-task manifest and a global index entry for QA/dev discoverability. The folder currently contains only README.md and INDEX.md but no manifest.json. This means the tests are invisible to the /dev and /qa commands that enumerate tests via the global manifest.
orphaned_tests.recommendation: Create tests/generated/20260524-205459/manifest.json with the active_tests[] entries for the 4 test functions, and add a task entry to tests/generated/manifest.json pointing at this per-task manifest.

hooks/userprompt-tmpfs-pressure.sh.notes: Active UserPromptSubmit hook referenced in settings.json. Modified change is a single-line redirect order fix (} 9> to } 2>/dev/null 9>). No cleanliness issues in this diff.

tests/generated/20260524-205459/test_arc.notes: New test file in correct location. 213 lines, 4 substantive tests. Missing per-task manifest and global manifest entry (orphaned_tests finding). Two regression tests intentionally overlap prior coverage (duplicate_tests finding, advisory only). The check-file-references.sh exit 2 (archive recommendation) is NOT applicable — exit 2 fires on doc-only references which is expected for test files that are not imported by other code.

summary.notes: Both findings are on the new test file (introduced_in_diff: true). The hook script is clean. The missing manifest is the more actionable finding — it affects test discoverability. The duplicate_tests finding is advisory (intentional regression guard overlap).

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex flagged three issues: (1) missing per-task and global manifest entries for the new test folder — a real discoverability gap per the test-writer agent contract; (2) two test functions intentionally overlap prior coverage in test_arch6_arch3.py — flagged as duplicate_tests; (3) OBSERVATION_ONLY agreement that check-file-references.sh exit 2 should not auto-become archive_candidates for new test files.

findings.issue: Zero findings is too strong — the new test folder lacks a per-task manifest.json and global manifest.json entry required by the test-writer agent contract (agents/test-writer.md lines 80-122). This makes the tests invisible to /dev and /qa enumeration.
findings.proposed_fix: Add orphaned_tests finding for tests/generated/20260524-205459/test_arch3_phase2.py with recommendation to create the per-task manifest and add a global index entry.
findings.rationale: Verified: tests/generated/manifest.json has 15 tasks, none for 20260524-205459. No per-task manifest.json exists in the folder. The test-writer contract at agents/test-writer.md is explicit about this requirement.

findings.issue: The 'not a duplicate' reasoning is too absolute. Two regression tests in the new file overlap scenario-for-scenario with tests in test_arch6_arch3.py.
findings.proposed_fix: Either remove the two regression-copy tests and keep only AC_SRC + AC7c, or note in the finding rationale that overlap is intentional. If strict dedupe required, add a minor duplicate_tests finding.
findings.rationale: Added minor duplicate_tests finding with advisory disposition. The '_regression' suffix in the test function names signals the overlap is intentional; the finding notes this explicitly and makes no blocking recommendation.

findings.issue: OBSERVATION_ONLY: Agrees that check-file-references.sh exit 2 should not automatically become archive_candidates for new test files.
findings.rationale: Confirms existing reasoning. No change to findings.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Applied two findings: (1) orphaned_tests finding for missing manifest; (2) minor duplicate_tests finding for intentional regression overlap. OBSERVATION_ONLY finding logged but no action taken.
